EventHandler.Name: CycleCountGeneration
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLItemLocs.CycleGenerationSp( PARMS(VAR V(Whse), VAR V(CycleType), VAR V(MaterialType), VAR V(ABCCode), VAR V(OverwriteRecords), VAR V(SortBy), VAR V(PageBetween), VAR V(PrintCutoffQty), VAR V(StartingItem), VAR V(EndingItem), VAR V(StartingLocation), VAR V(EndingLocation), VAR V(StartingProductCode), VAR V(EndingProductCode), VAR V(StartingPlannerCode), VAR V(EndingPlannerCode), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )
